headline: Carrier to Present at the Wolfe Research 19th Annual Global Transportation & Industrials Conference
summary: Carrier Global Corporation (NYSE: CARR) Chairman & CEO David Gitlin will speak at the Wolfe Research 19th Annual Global Transportation & Industrials Conference on Tuesday, May 19, 2026, at 12:50 p.m. ET.
